name: threejs-game-skills
description: Self-contained skills for building playable, polished Three.js, Phaser, and Babylon.js browser games.

interface.shortDescription: Skills for building playable, polished browser games with Three.js, Babylon.js, and Phaser.
interface.longDescription: A suite of self-contained skills for building complete browser games. Includes threejs-game-director (orchestration), threejs-gameplay-systems, threejs-aaa-graphics-builder, threejs-game-ui-designer, threejs-debug-profiler, threejs-qa-release, threejs-3d-generator, threejs-image-generator, threejs-audio-generator; babylon-game-director, babylon-gameplay-systems, babylon-aaa-graphics-builder, babylon-debug-profiler, babylon-qa-release, babylon-3d-generator, babylon-image-generator, babylon-audio-generator, babylon-game-ui-designer; and phaser-game-director, phaser-gameplay-systems, phaser-2d-graphics-builder, phaser-debug-profiler, phaser-qa-release.
defaultPrompt: Use threejs-game-director to build a premium game from scratch
Use babylon-game-director to build a premium Babylon.js 3D game from scratch
Use threejs-game-director to upgrade this game's visuals
Use threejs-game-director to debug and finish this game
